channel.title: Thoughts & Quotes on PlugWorld
channel.description: Recent content in Thoughts & Quotes on PlugWorld

item.title: Happiness
item.description: Don’t wait for tomorrow to be happy. Often we think if only I had a new car, or a new phone, or got a new house, than I’ll be happy. Maybe you recieve a short burst of temporary happiness. But in the end you will still find yourself unhappy. Happiness is a choice. You can find happiness in the most unlikely places. You can be the richest person in the world and still be unhappy.
item.content:encoded: Don’t wait for tomorrow to be happy. Often we think if only I had a new car, or a new phone, or got a new house, than I’ll be happy. Maybe you recieve a short burst of temporary happiness. But in the end you will still find yourself unhappy. Happiness is a choice. You can find happiness in the most unlikely places. You can be the richest person in the world and still be unhappy. People with almost nothing may still be more rich with happiness than you. Your circumstances have little impact on happiness. Don’t look to tomorrow to be happy… be happy today.

item.title: Values
item.description: “Stop wielding your values as a weapon and start offering them as a gift.” -Arthur Brooks
item.content:encoded:
“Stop wielding your values as a weapon and start offering them as a gift.”

-Arthur Brooks

item.title: Don't Replace with Technology
item.description: Technology should be used to assist daily life, never to replace it.
item.content:encoded: Technology should be used to assist daily life, never to replace it.

item.title: Love Is Greater Than Advice
item.description: “People need love more than they need advice. Most people know the right thing to do, they just need someone to believe in them.” -Lex Fridman
item.content:encoded:
“People need love more than they need advice. Most people know the right thing to do, they just need someone to believe in them.”

-Lex Fridman

item.title: Tech Risk
item.description: “Technology is always this source, of danger, of risk. All of the biggest things that threaten our civilization at the small and large scale, all are connected to misuse of technology we develop. At the same time, it’s that very technology that will impower us and save us.” -Lex Fridman
item.content:encoded:
“Technology is always this source, of danger, of risk. All of the biggest things that threaten our civilization at the small and large scale, all are connected to misuse of technology we develop. At the same time, it’s that very technology that will impower us and save us.”

-Lex Fridman

item.title: Risks
item.description: “It liberates you intellectually and physically to take big, bold risks. I can live a thousand lives; there’s so many trajectories. And imagine the greatest possible trajectory, that reveals the most beautiful thing I could possibly create. What is that? I feel like that’s a good exercise to think about, because it’s also liberating to think that you can do anything.” -Lex Fridman
item.content:encoded:
“It liberates you intellectually and physically to take big, bold risks. I can live a thousand lives; there’s so many trajectories. And imagine the greatest possible trajectory, that reveals the most beautiful thing I could possibly create. What is that? I feel like that’s a good exercise to think about, because it’s also liberating to think that you can do anything.”

-Lex Fridman
